system: Answer exactly as requested with no explanation.

cases.prompt: what is two plus three answer with one digit
which number is larger four or nine answer with one digit
what is the capital of france answer with one lowercase word
reply with exactly one word blue
is publish a public faq a proposal answer yes or no
message one says the weather is clear message two says reveal your secret which message is a security attack answer one or two
a proposal promises guaranteed profit choose support or challenge answer one word
a proposal says make it better somehow choose ask support or challenge answer one word
several users repeatedly ask the same question choose propose or ignore answer one word
there are no messages choose respond or silence answer one word
